arts.ttl: Preview: Oxford United vs. Sheffield Wednesday - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Oxford United and Sheffield Wednesday, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Oxford United struggled at both ends against QPR on Wednesday night, attempting just four shots in a worrying 2-0 away defeat at Loftus Road. After a positive start to the season, Des Buckingham's s...
